subcodes.first_line: Mention hath been made in the Tablet of Paradise of the Tree of Separation. God, verily, there is none other God but Him. He hath ordained for His chosen ones in these days that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ورقه الفردوس فی شجر الفراق الله لا اله الا هو قد قدر للاصفیا فی تلک الایام ما
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Manifestation of God as sun
